title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ceva Logistics India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ceva Logistics India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ceva Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ceva Logistics India:
Ceva Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ceva Logistics India!
